question_en: What license is React released under?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> SELECT ?l WHERE { ts:React ts:license ?l . }

question_en: In what year was Vite first released?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> SELECT ?y WHERE { ts:Vite ts:firstReleased ?y . }

question_en: Which organization maintains TypeScript?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ts:TypeScript ts:maintainedBy ?o . ?o rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: What programming language is Angular built with?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ts:Angular ts:builtWith ?l . ?l rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: What is the current stable version of Next.js?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> SELECT ?v WHERE { ts:NextJS ts:version ?v . }

question_en: List all frontend frameworks defined in this ontology.
question_ko: 이 온톨로지에 정의된 프론트엔드 프레임워크를 모두 나열하라.
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ?f a ts:FrontendFramework ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: Which technologies are maintained by Vercel?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ?t ts:maintainedBy ts:Vercel ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: Which technologies are built with TypeScript?
gold_answer_en: Bun, Angular, Next.js, Remix, pnpm, Vite
gold_answer_ko: Bun, Angular, Next.js, Remix, pnpm, Vite
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ?t ts:builtWith ts:TypeScript ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: Which package manager does pnpm supersede?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ts:pnpm ts:supersedes ?t . ?t rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: How many build tools are defined in this ontology?
question_ko: 이 온톨로지에 정의된 빌드 도구는 몇 개인가?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?t) AS ?n) WHERE { ?t a ts:BuildTool . }

question_en: Which technologies were first released in 2016?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ?t ts:firstReleased "2016"^^xsd:gYear ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: List every technology that Next.js transitively depends on.
question_ko: Next.js가 직접 또는 간접적으로 의존하는 모든 기술을 나열하라.
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { ts:NextJS ts:dependsOn+ ?t . ?t rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: List every technology that transitively depends on Node.js.
question_ko: Node.js에 (직접 또는 간접적으로) 의존하는 모든 기술을 나열하라.
gold_answer_en: React, Angular, Next.js, Remix, npm, pnpm, Vite, webpack
gold_answer_ko: React, Angular, Next.js, Remix, npm, pnpm, Vite, webpack
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { ?t ts:dependsOn+ ts:NodeJS . ?t rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: What does Remix transitively depend on?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { ts:Remix ts:dependsOn+ ?t . ?t rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: Which fullstack frameworks transitively depend on a runtime environment?
question_ko: 어떤 풀스택 프레임워크가 (직접 또는 간접적으로) RuntimeEnvironment에 의존하는가?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { ?f a ts:FullstackFramework ; ts:dependsOn+ ?r ; rdfs:label ?lbl . ?r a ts:RuntimeEnvironment . }

question_en: What is the full transitive dependency set of Vite?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { ts:Vite ts:dependsOn+ ?t . ?t rdfs:label ?lbl . }

trap_note: Vue.js is a popular real-world framework but is NOT in this ontology. LLM must refuse, not recall its release year (2014).
question_en: In what year was Vue.js first released according to this ontology?
question_ko: 이 온톨로지 기준 Vue.js는 몇 년에 처음 출시되었는가?
gold_answer_en: No information in this ontology. Vue.js is not defined.
gold_answer_ko: 이 온톨로지에 Vue.js는 정의되어 있지 않습니다.
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> SELECT ?t WHERE { ?t a ts:Technology . FILTER(STR(?t) = STR(ts:Vue)) }

trap_note: Svelte is a real popular frontend framework but not defined in this ontology.
question_en: What is the homepage URL of Svelte in this ontology?
gold_answer_en: No information in this ontology. Svelte is not defined.
gold_answer_ko: 이 온톨로지에 Svelte는 정의되어 있지 않습니다.
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> SELECT ?t WHERE { ?t a ts:Technology . FILTER(STR(?t) = STR(ts:Svelte)) }

trap_note: Deno is mentioned only inside a schema comment as an example, but no ABox instance exists. LLM must distinguish 'mentioned in schema comment' from 'defined as instance'.
question_en: Which organization maintains Deno in this ontology?
gold_answer_en: No information in this ontology. Deno has no ABox instance, only a passing mention in a schema comment.
gold_answer_ko: 이 온톨로지에 Deno 인스턴스는 없습니다 (스키마 주석에만 언급).
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> SELECT ?t WHERE { ?t a ts:RuntimeEnvironment . FILTER(STR(?t) = STR(ts:Deno)) }

trap_note: Yarn is a real package manager but is NOT in this ontology; supersedes(pnpm)=npm only. LLM must not invent Yarn data.
question_en: Which package manager was superseded by Yarn in this ontology?
question_ko: 이 온톨로지에서 Yarn이 대체한 패키지 매니저는?
gold_answer_en: No information in this ontology. Yarn is not defined.
gold_answer_ko: 이 온톨로지에 Yarn은 정의되어 있지 않습니다.
gold_sparql: PREFIX ts: <http://example.org/techstack#> SELECT ?t WHERE { ?t a ts:PackageManager . FILTER(STR(?t) = STR(ts:Yarn)) }
